subject: Warp Worker Stops
body:
Hi All, 

Noticed an error when starting Warp, re-booting the computer, and 
reinstalling Warp did not help. When starting processing the worker stops 
and does not process any data.  

Running WARP on the Gatan K3 computer Windows server 2012.  Warp was 
working fine until recently. Any idea what is causing this to happen and 
how to fix it?

Thanks
--Joshua Strauss
